headings.usage: Use for marketing hero, empty state titles, and massive section headers. Apply tracking-tighter.

body.usage: Standard UI text, chat messages, button labels.

monospace.usage: Code blocks, data extraction values, tags, timestamps.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. The grid must be visible.
spacing_and_layout.global_layout: F-pattern architecture. Collapsible left-sidebar for Projects/Sessions. Center is the Multi-tab Chat canvas. Right panel is the Context Extraction / Timeline Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). UI should feel rigid, objective, and functional.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary uses International Klein Blue. Hover states must change bg color and maintain inverse text contrast. Always include data-testid.
components.cards: border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-none. Never use soft shadows. For hover, add a sharp 4px translate-y and a hard block shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#002FA7]).
components.chat_bubbles: User: solid grey (bg-zinc-100) or brand tint with crisp edges. AI: stark white with border-l-2 border-primary. Avatars should be rigid squares.
components.tabs: Technical tabs. border-b border-zinc-200. Active tab has border-t-2 border-primary and border-x border-zinc-200 bg-white. No pill-shaped tabs.
components.model_selector: Shadcn Select. Crisp, rigid dropdowns with hover states maintaining contrast.
components.extraction_panel: Dense bento grid layout mode B (Control Room Grid). Tight gap-4. Every pixel utilized. Use monospace for extracted code/data.
components.form_elements: Use Shadcn/UI heavily customized to be flat, rectangular, with 1px border. Focus rings must use the accent color.

motion.hover: Instant color swaps or sharp architectural translates (e.g., -translate-y-1).

icons.style: duotone or regular, technical and dense.

images.description: Minimalist Swiss design AI network concept for new session empty state.
Abstract black and white brutalist UI elements for the context/extraction timeline background header.
White and black diamond pattern for sidebar decorative footer.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='model-selector-dropdown').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Active buttons must have high contrast. Focus states must have higher contrast than default.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Implement the layout with strict technical grid borders (border-collapse style). Add 1px borders around major sections.
Do NOT use generous border-radius. Max rounded-sm (4px) or rounded-none. Override shadcn components to remove border-radius.
Chat Area: Use Shadcn Tabs to implement multi-tab chats. Each tab should have its own Shadcn Select for the Model Selector.
Right Panel: Implement the 'Context Timeline Dashboard' here. Use dense bento grid components. This area tracks decisions, code, and extractions across models.
Ensure 'Extract Insights' button is prominent, uses the Primary Accent Color (#002FA7), and is fully flat.
Do NOT add authentication. Ensure the system works seamlessly for a single user/local user session.
